cases.evidence: fixture manifest page count and fixture files
valid fixtures pass and invalid documents are rejected
parent/children references are bidirectional and acyclic
one migration creates one revision and rerun creates none
editor state and prototype pollution are rejected
tampered artifact is rejected before runtime
malformed source creates no document, revision or migration record
CurrentDocumentMigration returns a draft without artifactHash/signature and rejects invalid graph or unknown manifest input
frontend and backend consume fixtures/designer-document-hash-fixture.json with the same sha256-prefixed canonical hash

unmeasuredPolicy: Coordinator must attach browser, provider, restarted-api and deletion-scan evidence before marking Pass.
